chapter_title.ar: باب عِدَّةِ الْمُطَلَّقَةِ وَ أَيْنَ تَعْتَدُّ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 28 – Waiting period of the divorced woman, and where she waits

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (21/155)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (21/155)
text: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنِ الْمُطَلَّقَةِ أَيْنَ تَعْتَدُّ فَقَالَ فِي بَيْتِ زَوْجِهَا .

en.hubeali: Humeyd Bin Ziyad, from Ibn sama’at, from Ibn Rabat, from Is’haq Bin Ammar,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup>, said, ‘I asked about the divorced woman, where she should wait’. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘In the house of her husband’.
en.sarwar: 8. Humayd ibn Ziyad has narrated from ibn Sama‘ah from ibn Ribat from Ishaq ibn ‘Ammar who has said the following: “I once asked abu al-Hassan, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the divorced woman; where she completes her waiting period. He (the Imam) said, ‘She completes it in the house of her husband.’”
